title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 472.210 - Appeals, procedure
text:
472.210.  Appeals, procedure. — Appeals shall be taken in accordance with the rules of civil procedure relating to appeals.
(RSMo 1939 § 286, A.L. 1955 p. 385 § 22, A.L. 1965 p. 633, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 287; 1919 § 284; 1909 § 291 
Effective 1-02-79
